creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
maho        2007-09-28 03:28:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    editors/openoffice.org-2 Makefile 
    editors/openoffice.org-2-RC Makefile 
    editors/openoffice.org-2-devel Makefile 
  Log:
  Unbreak for 7-CURRENT.
  
  Truckman was able to successfully build the port on
  a September 22nd copy of 7.0-CURRENT on an i386 machine
  with jdk-1.5.0.12p6_2,1, also use only 1.4 and 1.5, as JDK 1.6 has
  problem. See PR 116607.
  
  PR:     116607
  Submitted by:   truckman
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.305     +5 -3      ports/editors/openoffice.org-2-RC/Makefile
  1.333     +7 -1      ports/editors/openoffice.org-2-devel/Makefile
  1.286     +5 -3      ports/editors/openoffice.org-2/Makefile
